matrix.ac_text: Given I am a Product Manager, when I access the bond product creation form, then I should be able to enter type, maturity, coupon rate, and issue price.
Given I submit valid product details, when I save, then the bond product should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given a bond product is created, when I view the product list, then the new product should appear.
Given I am not authorized, when I try to create a bond product, then I should be denied access.
Given I create a bond product, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am authorized, when I access the bond issuance screen, then I should be able to select a bond product and enter issuance details.
Given I submit valid issuance details, when I confirm, then the bonds should be issued and available for subscription.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given bonds are issued, when I view the bond registry, then the new issuance should be listed.
Given I am not authorized, when I try to issue bonds, then I should be denied access.
Given I issue bonds, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Customer, when I view available bond products, then I should see subscription options.
Given I submit a valid subscription request, when I confirm, then my subscription should be recorded and pending allocation.
Given I submit an invalid or incomplete request, when I try to subscribe, then I should see validation errors.
Given I subscribe to a bond, when I view my investments, then the subscription should be listed.
Given I attempt to subscribe beyond product or regulatory limits, then I should be prevented.
Given I subscribe to a bond, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given subscriptions are received, when allocation is processed, then bonds should be distributed according to defined rules and limits.
Given a subscription exceeds limits, when allocation is processed, then the excess should be rejected or adjusted.
Given allocation is complete, when I view the bondholder registry, then all allocations should be visible.
Given allocation is processed, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given a subscriber is not eligible, when allocation is processed, then the subscription should be denied.
Given allocation is complete, when I view my investments, then my allocated bonds should be listed. ---
Given a coupon payment date arrives, when the system runs the calculation, then interest should be computed for all eligible bondholders.
Given interest is paid, when a bondholder views their account, then the payment should be visible in the transaction history.
Given a bond is not eligible (e.g., redeemed), when the system runs, then no interest should be paid.
Given an error occurs during payment, when the process completes, then the error should be logged and reported.
Given interest is paid, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am a bondholder, when I view my statement, then I should see all coupon payments. ---
Given my bond matures, when I access my account, then I should see an option to redeem.
Given I request early buyback, when I am eligible, then the system should process the request as per product rules.
Given I request redemption or buyback, when I confirm, then my bond status should update and funds should be credited.
Given I request redemption on a non-eligible bond, then I should be prevented.
Given redemption or buyback is processed, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not the bondholder, when I try to redeem or request buyback, then I should be denied access. ---
Given bonds are issued and allocated, when I view the bondholder registry, then all bondholders and their holdings should be listed.
Given a bond status changes (e.g., redeemed, transferred), when I view the registry, then the new status should be displayed.
Given I search or filter the registry, when I enter criteria, then matching bondholders should be displayed.
Given a bondholder’s status changes, when I view the audit log, then the change should be recorded.
Given I am not authorized, when I try to access the registry, then I should be denied.
Given I export the registry, when I confirm, then I should receive a file with the data. ---
Given I am an Accountant, when I access the chart of accounts, then I should be able to create, edit, or deactivate accounts.
Given I submit valid account details, when I save, then the account should be created or updated.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I view the chart of accounts, when I search or filter, then matching accounts should be displayed.
Given I am not an Accountant, when I try to manage accounts, then I should be denied access.
Given I create or edit an account, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am an Accountant, when I access the journal entry screen, then I should be able to create new entries.
Given I submit valid entry details, when I save, then the journal entry should be recorded.
Given I enter invalid or unbalanced entries, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I create an entry, when I view the general ledger, then the entry should be reflected.
Given I am not an Accountant, when I try to create journal entries, then I should be denied access.
Given I create a journal entry, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given journal entries are created, when I view the general ledger, then all postings should be up to date.
Given I search or filter the ledger, when I enter criteria, then matching entries should be displayed.
Given an entry is edited or reversed, when I view the ledger, then the change should be reflected.
Given I am not authorized, when I try to access the ledger, then I should be denied.
Given I export the ledger, when I confirm, then I should receive a file with the data.
Given I view the audit log, when a ledger change occurs, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am an Accountant, when I access the reports section, then I should see options for trial balance, balance sheet, and P&L.
Given I generate a report, when I select a period, then the report should be created with accurate data.
Given I enter invalid parameters, when I try to generate a report, then I should see validation errors.
Given I view a report, when I export, then I should be able to download it in PDF, Excel, or CSV.
Given I am not an Accountant, when I try to generate financial statements, then I should be denied access.
Given I generate a report, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am an Accountant, when I access the reconciliation screen, then I should see all unposted or unreconciled transactions.
Given I post a transaction, when I confirm, then the transaction should be marked as posted.
Given I reconcile transactions, when I confirm, then the books should balance and discrepancies should be flagged.
Given I attempt to post or reconcile invalid transactions, then I should be prevented.
Given I am not an Accountant, when I try to post or reconcile, then I should be denied access.
Given I post or reconcile, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am an Accountant, when I access period closing, then I should see the current and next period.
Given I close a period, when I confirm, then the period should be marked as closed and no further postings allowed.
Given I attempt to skip a period, when I try to close, then I should be prevented.
Given I close a period, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not an Accountant, when I try to close periods, then I should be denied access.
Given I close a period, when I generate reports, then the data should reflect the closed period. ---
Given I am an Auditor, when I access the audit log, then I should see all journal entries and period closings.
Given I search or filter the log, when I enter criteria, then matching actions should be displayed.
Given I am not an Auditor, when I try to access the audit log, then I should be denied.
Given I export the audit log, when I confirm, then I should receive a file with the data.
Given I review an entry or closing, when I view details, then all relevant information should be displayed.
Given I find a compliance issue, when I flag it, then the issue should be recorded for follow-up. ---
Given I am an Admin, when I access event management, then I should be able to define new event types.
Given I submit valid event details, when I save, then the event type should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I am not an Admin, when I try to define events, then I should be denied access.
Given I define an event, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I define an event, when I view the event type list, then the new type should appear. ---
Given an event occurs, when I view the event log, then the event should be recorded with type, timestamp, and details.
Given I search or filter the event log, when I enter criteria, then matching events should be displayed.
Given an event is categorized, when I view the log, then the category should be visible.
Given I am not authorized, when I try to access the event log, then I should be denied.
Given I export the event log, when I confirm, then I should receive a file with the data.
Given I view the audit log, when an event is logged, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given an event rule is triggered, when I am a relevant user, then I should receive a notification or alert.
Given I receive a notification, when I click it, then I should be taken to the relevant screen or details.
Given I dismiss a notification, when I refresh, then it should not reappear.
Given I have no relevant events, when I log in, then I should not see any notifications.
Given I am not authorized, when I try to configure event rules, then I should be denied.
Given a notification is sent, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am an Auditor, when I access the event history, then I should see all logged events with details.
Given I search or filter the event history, when I enter criteria, then matching events should be displayed.
Given I am not an Auditor, when I try to access the event history, then I should be denied.
Given I export the event history, when I confirm, then I should receive a file with the data.
Given I review an event, when I view details, then all relevant information should be displayed.
Given I find a compliance issue, when I flag it, then the issue should be recorded for follow-up. ---
Given I am a User, when I access the reports section, then I should see options for standard reports.
Given I select a report and parameters, when I generate, then the report should be created with accurate data.
Given I enter invalid parameters, when I try to generate a report, then I should see validation errors.
Given I view a report, when I export, then I should be able to download it in PDF, Excel, or CSV.
Given I am not authorized, when I try to generate reports, then I should be denied access.
Given I generate a report, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Compliance Officer, when I access the regulatory reports section, then I should see all required report types.
Given I select a report and parameters, when I generate, then the report should be created with accurate data.
Given I enter invalid parameters, when I try to generate a report, then I should see validation errors.
Given I view a report, when I export, then I should be able to download it in PDF, Excel, or CSV.
Given I am not a Compliance Officer, when I try to generate regulatory reports, then I should be denied access.
Given I generate a report, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Power User, when I access the custom report builder, then I should be able to select data sources and fields.
Given I build a valid query, when I generate, then the custom report should be created with accurate data.
Given I build an invalid query, when I try to generate, then I should see validation errors.
Given I view a custom report, when I export, then I should be able to download it in PDF, Excel, or CSV.
Given I am not a Power User, when I try to use the custom report builder, then I should be denied access.
Given I generate a custom report, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I generate a report, when I view it, then I should see export options for PDF, Excel, and CSV.
Given I select an export format, when I confirm, then the report should be downloaded in the chosen format.
Given I attempt to export a report I am not authorized to view, then I should be denied.
Given I export a report, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I export a large report, when the process completes, then the file should be complete and accurate.
Given I am a User, when I export, then the exported file should match the on-screen data. ---
Given I am a User, when I access the report scheduling screen, then I should be able to set up schedules for reports.
Given I schedule a report, when the scheduled time arrives, then the report should be generated automatically.
Given I generate a report on demand, when I request, then the report should be created immediately.
Given I view scheduled reports, when I check status, then I should see completed and pending reports.
Given I am not authorized, when I try to schedule or generate reports, then I should be denied.
Given a report is generated, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am an Admin, when I access report access settings, then I should be able to assign permissions to users and roles.
Given I update permissions, when I save, then only authorized users should be able to access restricted reports.
Given I attempt to access a report without permission, then I should be denied.
Given I update access settings, when I view the audit log, then the change should be recorded.
Given I am not an Admin, when I try to change report access, then I should be denied.
Given I am a User, when my permissions change, then my report access should update accordingly. ---
Given I am an Admin, when I access custom field settings, then I should be able to create and edit fields.
Given I create a custom field, when I save, then the field should be available in relevant forms.
Given I define a dynamic form, when I save, then the form should update to include the new fields.
Given I enter invalid field definitions, when I try to save, then I should see validation errors.
Given I am not an Admin, when I try to create custom fields, then I should be denied.
Given I create or edit a custom field, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am an Admin, when I access parameter settings, then I should be able to create and edit parameters.
Given I define a parameter, when I save, then the parameter should be available for use in products and workflows.
Given I enter invalid parameter definitions, when I try to save, then I should see validation errors.
Given I am not an Admin, when I try to define parameters, then I should be denied.
Given I create or edit a parameter, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I update a parameter, when I view affected products or workflows, then the changes should be reflected. ---
Given I am a User, when I access language and currency settings, then I should see all supported options.
Given I select a language or currency, when I save, then the system UI and data should update accordingly.
Given I log in again, when I have a preferred language or currency, then the UI and data should default to my preferences.
Given I select an unsupported language or currency, when I save, then I should see an error.
Given I am not logged in, when I try to change language or currency, then I should be redirected to login.
Given I change my settings, when I view the UI and data, then all labels, messages, and amounts should be translated and converted. ---
Given I am an Admin, when I access integration settings, then I should be able to add, edit, or remove integrations.
Given I configure a valid integration, when I save, then the system should connect as specified.
Given I enter invalid integration details, when I try to save, then I should see validation errors.
Given I am not an Admin, when I try to configure integrations, then I should be denied.
Given I configure or update an integration, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I test an integration, when I run a test, then the system should report success or failure. ---
Given a configuration change occurs, when I view the audit log, then the change should be recorded with timestamp and user.
Given I am an Auditor, when I access the audit log, then I should see all configuration changes.
Given I am not an Auditor, when I try to access the audit log, then I should be denied.
Given I search the audit log, when I enter criteria, then matching changes should be displayed.
Given I export the audit log, when I confirm, then I should receive a file with the log data.
Given I review a change, when I view details, then all relevant information should be displayed. ---
Given I am not authenticated, when I try to access any advanced module, then I should be redirected to login.
Given I am authenticated, when I access a module, then my permissions should be checked before access is granted.
Given I lack authorization, when I try to perform an action, then I should be denied access.
Given I am authenticated and authorized, when I perform an action, then it should proceed.
Given I am an Admin, when I update user roles, then permissions should update accordingly.
Given I am a User, when my session expires, then I should be logged out and required to re-authenticate. ---
Given a critical action occurs, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded with timestamp and user.
Given I am an Auditor, when I access the audit log, then I should see all advanced actions.
Given I am not an Auditor, when I try to access the audit log, then I should be denied.
Given I search the audit log, when I enter criteria, then matching actions should be displayed.
Given I export the audit log, when I confirm, then I should receive a file with the log data.
Given I perform a non-critical action, when I view the audit log, then it should not appear in the critical audit trail. ---

matrix.story_title: 32. Efficient Report Generation for Large Data Sets
matrix.ac_text: Given I generate a report with a large data set, when the process completes, then the report should be accurate and complete.

matrix.story_title: 32. Efficient Report Generation for Large Data Sets
matrix.ac_text: Given I generate a report, when the data set is very large, then the system should notify me of progress or delays.

matrix.story_title: 32. Efficient Report Generation for Large Data Sets
matrix.ac_text: Given I attempt to generate a report that exceeds system limits, then I should see an error or be prompted to refine my criteria.

matrix.story_title: 32. Efficient Report Generation for Large Data Sets
matrix.ac_text: Given I generate a report, when I view the output, then it should match the requested parameters.

matrix.story_title: 32. Efficient Report Generation for Large Data Sets
matrix.ac_text: Given I am a User, when I generate multiple reports, then system performance should remain acceptable.

matrix.story_title: 32. Efficient Report Generation for Large Data Sets
matrix.ac_text: Given I generate a report, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---

matrix.story_title: 33. Multi-language & Multi-currency Support for All Modules
matrix.ac_text: Given I am a User, when I access any module, then I should see all labels and messages in my selected language.

matrix.story_title: 33. Multi-language & Multi-currency Support for All Modules
matrix.ac_text: Given I view financial data, when I select a currency, then all amounts should be displayed in that currency.

matrix.story_title: 33. Multi-language & Multi-currency Support for All Modules
matrix.ac_text: Given I change my language or currency, when I save, then the system should update all modules accordingly.

matrix.story_title: 33. Multi-language & Multi-currency Support for All Modules
matrix.ac_text: Given I select an unsupported language or currency, when I save, then I should see an error.

matrix.story_title: 33. Multi-language & Multi-currency Support for All Modules
matrix.ac_text: Given I am not logged in, when I try to change language or currency, then I should be redirected to login.

matrix.story_title: 33. Multi-language & Multi-currency Support for All Modules
matrix.ac_text: Given I change my settings, when I view the UI and data, then all modules should reflect my preferences. ---
Given I am a Compliance Officer, when I review system configuration, then I should see evidence of secure data handling.
Given I submit sensitive data, when I inspect the network, then the data should be encrypted.
Given I am an Auditor, when I review logs, then all data access and changes should be recorded.
Given I test the system, when I attempt non-compliant actions, then I should be prevented.
Given I am not a Compliance Officer, when I try to access compliance settings, then I should be denied.
Given I am a security auditor, when I test the system, then all endpoints should require encryption and compliance. ---
